[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 1011001 4
2 0001011 3
3 1100101 4
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 0011011 4
7 0110111 5

01 10 1101111 6
12 21 1111111 a match 4 5
23 32 0110111 5 match 7

56 65 1111011 6
67 76 0111000 3
70 07 1110101 5

35 53 1010011 4

60 06 1111101 6
71 17 1111010 5

50 05 1100111 5
61 16 1111010 5
